global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with product images and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock items with free shipping and a clear price.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a fresh and lively backdrop.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A rectangular area showcasing three vertical product images with a glossy finish, suggesting a display of items.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned to the left of the product display, likely representing a feature or option.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon, similar to the previous one, located next to the product display.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon, completing the set next to the product display, maintaining a consistent design.

elements.label: Limited stock text
elements.description: Bold, large text stating 'Limited stock' in a prominent position, emphasizing urgency.

elements.label: Shipping offer text
elements.description: Smaller text below the 'Limited stock' message, stating 'Free shipping over $25' in a clear font.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: A bold price tag reading '$4.99' positioned at the bottom left, drawing attention to the cost.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Start now' at the bottom center, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The logo 'LuxShelf' displayed at the top left, featuring a modern font style.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A secondary button labeled 'Start now' at the bottom right, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: A small price tag showing '$4.99' at the bottom left, clearly indicating the cost of the product.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, bright and modern, limited stock, free shipping
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Limited stock, Free shipping over $25, LuxShelf, Start now, $4.99
